step_rationale: Central lipid substrate; ApoB-lipoprotein retention; oxidative modification; foam cell lipidome; plaque crystalline inflammation.
mechanism: Cholesterol and atherogenic lipoprotein-associated cholesterol drive intimal retention, foam cell formation, inflammasome activation, and plaque destabilization.
